events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll inspect the micron gauge image, read the two values, then write the required JSON directly to `/app/answer.json`.

events.label: assistant
events.text: The gauge shows 425 microns at pump isolation and 1495 microns after 10 minutes, so the standing decay is 1070 microns over 10 minutes. I’m recording that as a failed evacuation/decay test because it does not demonstrate a dry, tight system.
